div.p: Seven psalms of David considered lamentations. These frequently are found in books of hours and are typically followed by the litany, which can be used to locate the use of a certain book.
1. Psalm 6 (Domine ne in furore tuo aruas me.)
3. Psalm 37 (38) (Domine ne in furore tuo arguas me.)
Psalm 50 (51) (Miserere mei, Deus, secundum magnam misericordiam tuam.)
Psalm 101 (102) (Domine, exaudi orationem meam, et clamor meus ad te veniat.)
Psalm 129 (130) (De profundis clamavi ad te, Domine.)
Psalm 142 (143) (Domine, exaudi orationem meam: auribus percipe obsecrationem meam in veritate tua.)
